name: IRC_CAMP_POST_CONTENT_VL
query: SELECT B.POST_CONTENT_ID, B.ASSET_ID, B.PRIMARY_LINK_TYPE_CODE, B.PRIMARY_ASSET_URL_ID, B.SECONDARY_LINK_TYPE_CODE, B.SECONDARY_ASSET_URL_ID, B.IMAGE_URL, TL.TITLE, TL.DESCRIPTION, TL.PRIMARY_LABEL, TL.SECONDARY_LABEL, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_CAMP_POST_CONTENT_B B, IRC_CAMP_POST_CONTENT_TL TL WHERE B.POST_CONTENT_ID = TL.POST_CONTENT_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
